expectations.text: Response invokes retriever or explicitly calls awk to fetch Task 3 description from Doc/Task.md before writing code
expectations.evidence: Baseline used 17 tool calls to browse project files, but went straight to pd.read_parquet and code cells. No awk retriever call, no 'Context Confirmed' step, no schema confirmation from Doc/Data.md

expectations.text: At least one notebook cell shown is a Markdown cell containing a LaTeX equation ($ or $$)
expectations.evidence: No LaTeX equations anywhere in the response. Theory is explained in prose comments and cell-level text blocks, not LaTeX markdown cells

expectations.text: Data loading code uses pandas (read_parquet or read_csv), and computation code uses numpy — not mixed in the same cell
expectations.evidence: All computation stays in pandas throughout: groupby, merge, max(axis=1), etc. No explicit numpy conversion boundary. No numpy arrays created

expectations.text: A cache/serialization pattern is shown (np.save, joblib.dump, or Path.exists() guard)
expectations.evidence: county_demand.csv is saved via pandas to_csv, but no .npy cache, no joblib, no Path.exists() guard for expensive operations

expectations.text: A sanity check is included (assert statement or print of shape/stats)
expectations.evidence: Cell 1-D has sanity checks: prints megaregion totals, top-10 counties by demand, zero-demand county count
